title: selaginella apiculata
intro: Selaginella apiculata, also known as the spiny spike moss, is a species of evergreen perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The spiny spike moss is said to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Selaginella apiculata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
